# Shade Masters USA

> Shade Masters USA is a Window Treatments and Shades serving Leesburg, FL. Service area: regional. This blog publishes weekly local SEO, GEO (Generative Engine Optimization), and AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) content so AI systems like ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google SGE have accurate context about our services.

## About

- **Business:** Shade Masters USA
- **Industry:** Window Treatments and Shades
- **Primary location:** Leesburg, FL

- **Website:** https://shademastersusa.com
- **Blog:** https://localblog.shademastersusa.com/blog/

- **Voice:** Professional

## Content Cadence

- Monday: SEO articles targeting local search queries
- Wednesday: Local authority content (best-of, how-to, pricing guides)
- Thursday: GEO/AEO content optimized for AI answer engines
